blockers: Botox/Botulinum (BOTU100, BT100) — needs legal review (Schedule 1 Select Agent + Rx-only) before activating on storefront. BT100 hidden today as orphan but BOTU100 still in catalog.
ET50 from Rosyy never arrived — recorded in PO-2026-0003 (status='partial'). Decide: refund/credit/reorder
Pending Eve PO-2026-0001 still open ($1,350) — awaiting shipment
Welcome 2/3 emails are manual-trigger only (no auto-cron); ok at low volume
Email templates (PO, ambassador welcome, order confirmation) still use dark navy palette — should migrate to cream brand palette eventually
Vendor JSONs still have 48 entries with our_sku=null — backfill SQL fixed the database, but if JSONs are ever re-run as a seed source the gap returns. Patching the JSON files is a follow-up task.
Dihexa, GHK-Cu 200mg, NAD+ 300mg are in catalog but no vendor in our JSONs offers them. Currently hidden. Either chase vendor availability via WhatsApp or delete.
Default retail prices on ~97 newly-inserted products from 2026-04-21_ensure_all_products_visible.sql are placeholders (~50% margin) — user should update via inventory Edit button when they have time.
12 anabolic steroid tablets are inserted as hidden — needs legal review before activating on storefront. Same Schedule-III risk as Botox.
Default retail prices on 81 new tablets are 2× cost (placeholder) — real market research needed before activation.
current.next_action: Recruit ambassadors via WhatsApp (use docs/ambassadors/recruitment-script.md). Content calendar publishes Mon Apr 27. Multi-vendor order sheet at /admin/purchases/multi is ready to use for next restock — auto-routes everything to cheapest vendor and splits into multiple POs in one click.
current.last_session: 2026-04-21 (continued) — Eve sent her oral tablet catalog; added 81 new SKUs (steroids, SARMs, PCT, pharma, thyroid, oral peptides) via 2026-04-21_eve_tablets_finished_products.sql with all hidden except DHA20 Dihexa (resolves prior orphan question). Renamed SLU-PP-322 → SLU-PP-332 to match Eve's sheet (SKU SL322 unchanged). Added 6-bucket type filter (Peptide / Steroid / SARM / Pharma / Supply / Cosmetic) to both order sheets via typeFor() helper. Added 58 layman explanations for new tablets in InfoIcon tooltips. Fixed bug where products fetch was missing cat field — type filter was always defaulting to Peptide.
completed_today: Multi-Vendor Order Sheet at /admin/purchases/multi — auto-routes to cheapest vendor, per-row + bulk override, summary panel, splits into multi-PO on submit
Per-vendor PO catalog: rows where another vendor is cheaper now dim with '↓ Vendor $XX' subtitle
Storefront product page: OOS items show 'This ships in 2-3 weeks' (amber) and Add-to-Order stays enabled (was hard-blocking)
Renamed BBG Blend → 'Glow Plus' and GLOW50 Blend → 'Glow' across products table + Adonis app catalog (app.html, public/app.html, lib/constants/peptides.js)

SQL migration: 2026-04-21_ensure_all_products_visible.sql — INSERTs 97 products from vendor JSONs (ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING) + UPDATEs active=true. Fixes Adipotide, AICAR, Melatonin 10mg, 5-Amino-1MQ etc.
SQL migration: 2026-04-21_backfill_vendor_prices_for_orphan_products.sql — 80 vendor_prices rows added across Eve/Weak/Rosyy for the 48 SKUs that had our_sku=null in JSONs
One-off SQL: hid 5 truly orphan products (CI10, BT100, DH10, GC200, NA300) via UPDATE active=false
Multi-vendor sheet: removed active=false filter so admin sees all products (Lemon Bottle, Botox, etc.) with HIDDEN badge inline. Storefront still respects active=false.
InfoIcon component (lib/constants/peptide-explanations.js) — React state-based tooltip on ? icons, 75 compounds with layman 'what you notice' explanations. Used in both order sheet pages.
Pricing audit: identified Weak strictly cheapest on 18 SKUs (CagriSema -$35, Dermorphin -$19, Kisspeptin-10 -$14 lead the savings list). Top Rosyy savings: VP10 (-$19), G10K (-$17), MC40 (-$15).
Vendor cell on inventory page now shows cheapest vendor + LOF (last ordered from) subtitle. Cost columns split into Kit $ + Vial $ derived from kit ÷ 10.

Eve's oral tablet catalog audited + 81 SKUs added (anabolic steroids 12, SARMs 8, PCT 7, thyroid 3, stimulant 2, pharma 11, oral peptides 7, weight loss orals 2, etc.) via 2026-04-21_eve_tablets_finished_products.sql
Dihexa activated — DHA20 (Dihexa 20mg tablet from Eve $130) replaces the prior hidden orphan DH10 vial
SLU-PP-322 renamed to SLU-PP-332 to match Eve's sheet — SKU SL322 unchanged, display name + 4 code files updated

Type filter on order sheets — 6 buckets: Peptide / Steroid / SARM / Pharma / Supply / Cosmetic. Steroid absorbs Anabolic + Stimulant + PCT + Thyroid (cycle-adjacent). Peptide absorbs Weight Loss (GLP-1s).
58 layman 'what you notice' explanations for the new tablet/oral compounds added to InfoIcon tooltips
Bug fix: products fetch was missing cat field on both /admin/purchases/multi and /admin/purchases pages — type filter always returned Peptide. Added cat to SELECT (commit f70d5d5).

roadmap_ideas.title: Patch vendor JSON files to set our_sku for the 48 entries currently mapped null
roadmap_ideas.summary: DB-level fix is done via backfill migration. But the JSONs at docs/vendors/{eve,weak,rosyy}-pricing.json still have our_sku=null on 48 entries. If ever re-seeded the gap returns. Mapping is straightforward: match by name+size to existing products.sku.
roadmap_ideas.next_step: Write a Python script that updates the JSON files in place using products name+size → sku lookup. Single PR.

roadmap_ideas.title: Discount OOS items to crowdfund 10-vial POs
roadmap_ideas.summary: OOS items show heavy discount price + 'extended wait time' framing; orders queue until enough cash to fund a 10-vial PO. Storefront already shows 'This ships in 2-3 weeks' for OOS items as of 2026-04-21, so the UX path is lighter — just need discount pricing + queue-to-PO threshold logic.
roadmap_ideas.next_step: Brainstorming session — start by deciding which open question matters most (discount depth vs framing vs fulfillment risk).

roadmap_ideas.title: Decide whether dashboard surfaces both 'actual paid' and 'replacement cost' wholesale
roadmap_ideas.summary: Inventory Wholesale uses paid cost basis (PO unit_cost) where known, falls back to products.cost (cheapest vendor). Could add a separate 'Replacement Wholesale' card to make the gap explicit.
roadmap_ideas.next_step: Wait until cost basis vs replacement gap actually causes confusion in practice; revisit if Jorrel asks again.

roadmap_ideas.title: Decide whether to DELETE the 5 hidden orphan products (CI10, BT100, DH10, GC200, NA300)
roadmap_ideas.summary: CI10 + BT100 are likely duplicates of CJCI10 + BOTU100. DH10 (Dihexa), GC200 (GHK-Cu 200mg), NA300 (NAD+ 300mg) have no vendor JSON entry. All hidden via UPDATE active=false on 2026-04-21.
roadmap_ideas.next_step: Leave hidden for a few weeks; if no vendor surfaces and no PO references found, run DELETE. Cascades will clean up vendor_prices automatically (ON DELETE CASCADE).

roadmap_ideas.title: Cron the welcome 2/3 emails (currently manual)
roadmap_ideas.summary: subscribe-welcome-2 and subscribe-welcome-3 are manual triggers. At low subscriber volume this is fine; at scale needs Vercel cron + Supabase 'last_sent' tracking on subscribers table.
roadmap_ideas.next_step: Defer until subscriber volume justifies the cron+state work.

roadmap_ideas.title: Migrate transactional emails to cream brand palette
roadmap_ideas.summary: PO confirmation, order confirmation, ambassador welcome still use dark navy (legacy from Elysian branding). Should match advnce labs cream + cyan + amber identity.
roadmap_ideas.next_step: Batch all three transactional templates in one pass when ready for visual polish.

roadmap_ideas.title: Botox/Botulinum legal review before activation
roadmap_ideas.summary: BOTU100 hidden on storefront. BT100 hidden as orphan duplicate on 2026-04-21. Schedule 1 Select Agent + Rx-only. Need attorney review before exposing.
roadmap_ideas.next_step: Engage legal counsel; estimate ~$500-1500 for opinion letter.

roadmap_ideas.title: Subscription model: customers commit to monthly volume for discount
roadmap_ideas.status: captured (in OOS idea memory), not scoped
roadmap_ideas.summary: Smooth out PO cadence by giving subscribers a discount in exchange for committing to monthly volume. Adjacent to the OOS pre-sell idea — both convert future demand into present cash flow.

roadmap_ideas.title: Wholesale ambassador kits — front cash for inventory at wholesale, sell at retail
roadmap_ideas.status: captured (in OOS idea memory), not scoped
roadmap_ideas.summary: Ambassadors front cash for a starter kit at wholesale prices, then sell at retail and keep the margin. Bigger lever than commission program but riskier (compliance, customer support burden, reputation if mishandled).

roadmap_ideas.title: Decide which of the 80 hidden oral-tablet SKUs to activate (and to whom)
roadmap_ideas.summary: 81 new oral tablet SKUs from Eve's 2026-04-21 sheet sit hidden in admin: 12 anabolic steroids (Schedule III legal risk), 8 SARMs, 7 PCT/AI, 3 thyroid, 2 stimulants, 11 pharma (Sildenafil, Finasteride, etc.), 7 oral peptide forms, 2 oral GLP-1s, etc. Different audiences and legal profiles per cluster. Default retail = 2× cost (placeholder).
roadmap_ideas.next_step: Brainstorm: same site or new vertical? Start with lowest-risk additions (Methylene Blue, oral peptides, SARMs) and grow from there. Steroid tablets need legal review like Botox.

roadmap_ideas.title: Add tablets to vendor JSON source-of-truth or create separate file
roadmap_ideas.summary: docs/vendors/eve-pricing.json currently only covers peptide vials. The 81 new tablet SKUs are only in the migration. If the JSONs are ever re-run as a seed source, the tablets won't be regenerated.
roadmap_ideas.next_step: Either extend eve-pricing.json with a 'tablets' section (cleaner) or create eve-tablets.json (more granular). One-time data extraction from the migration file.

setup.next_setup_action: Optional: Create ROADMAP.md if a formal roadmap doc is desired. roadmap_ideas[] in this file is the working list.
